serena.$comment: Semantic code navigation and persistent project memories. Uses installed binary — NOT uvx (too slow, exceeds MCP timeout).

context7.$comment: Up-to-date documentation and code examples via Context7

playwright.$comment: Browser automation for E2E spot-checks. Uses persistent Brave profile. Stop hook auto-enforces browser_close. Supports localhost (dev) and *.getklai.com (prod).

codeindex.$comment: Graph-powered code intelligence. Install: npm i -g klai-private/tools/codeindex-1.3.56.tgz && codeindex analyze

grafana.$comment: AI agent access to Grafana dashboards, metrics queries, and alerts. Read-only. VictoriaLogs queries use the dedicated victorialogs MCP instead.

victorialogs.$comment: LogsQL queries against VictoriaLogs. Requires SSH tunnel: ./scripts/victorialogs-tunnel.sh
